name: United Check Cashing
description_short: United Check Cashing operates two locations in Delaware and New Jersey, offering check cashing, money transfers, money orders, bill payment, and alternative financial services for unbanked and underbanked consumers.
description_long:
United Check Cashing is a check-cashing and alternative financial services provider with two physical locations: one in Claymont, Delaware and one in West Berlin, New Jersey. The company positions itself as a comprehensive financial services center designed for consumers who prefer to manage money on a cash basis rather than through traditional banking. Founded to serve customers who may be underserved by conventional banks, the company emphasizes accessibility and convenience through extended hours and multiple service offerings. United Check Cashing explicitly markets itself as "Better than a bank" with a focus on fast, straightforward transactions.

Beyond basic check cashing, United Check Cashing offers a diverse menu of financial services including money transfers (domestic and international), money orders, electronic bill payment to hundreds of billers, prepaid debit cards (Visa and MasterCard branded), and debit card load/unload services. The company also provides cryptocurrency access through Bitcoin sales, gold and silver jewelry buying, gift card purchasing, coin counting, notary services, transit pass sales, prepaid phone cards, and document copying and faxing. This breadth of services reflects an intentional strategy to become a one-stop shop for cash-based financial needs.

United Check Cashing distinguishes itself through its multi-service model that addresses the practical needs of cash-based consumers who may lack traditional bank accounts or prefer alternative financial services. The company operates extended hours ("open late nights") to accommodate customers who work non-traditional schedules. Unlike single-service check cashing outlets, United offers complementary services like bill payment, money transfer, and prepaid card loading that create customer convenience and repeat visits.

As a local, geographically limited operator with only two locations, United Check Cashing serves primarily the Delaware and New Jersey markets. The company charges fees for its services, though specific fee structures are not disclosed on the website. Customers should verify current rates and service availability at their nearest location, as the website notes that certain services (marked with asterisks) are available only at select locations. The prepaid debit card offering provides a safer alternative to cash, though it lacks the fraud protections and FDIC insurance of traditional bank accounts.
pros: Offers check cashing with extended late-night hours for after-hours access
Multi-service platform combining check cashing, money transfer, bill payment, and prepaid cards in one location
Accepts checks made payable to businesses, not just individuals
Provides Bitcoin purchase access for customers seeking cryptocurrency
Offers coin counting service with immediate cash conversion
Includes notary services with valid picture ID for document authentication
Sells prepaid Visa and MasterCard debit cards that function like credit cards without debt risk
cons: Only two physical locations (Claymont, DE and West Berlin, NJ), limiting accessibility for most consumers
No fee schedule or pricing information disclosed on website, making cost comparison difficult
Some services (gold buying, gift card purchase, copy/fax) available only at select locations, creating service inconsistency
No online or mobile check cashing capability mentioned; requires in-person visits
No information about check cashing limits, holds, or verification requirements
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers in Delaware and New Jersey who prefer cash-based money management
Small business owners needing to cash business checks and process payments
International workers or immigrants needing quick, affordable domestic and international money transfers
Individuals seeking alternative financial services like prepaid debit cards, money orders, and bill payment outside traditional banking
diagnosis: United Check Cashing is best for unbanked consumers and small business owners in Delaware and New Jersey who need check cashing combined with complementary financial services like money transfer and bill payment. The primary caveat is severe geographic limitation—with only two locations, it serves a very restricted market and is inaccessible to consumers outside the Claymont, DE and West Berlin, NJ areas.
services: Electronic bill payment (hundreds of billers accepted)
Prepaid debit card sales (Visa and MasterCard)
Debit card load/unload for any PIN-based debit card
Gold, silver, and platinum jewelry buying
